notes: No force-fit detected. no — the indriyāṇi indriya-arthebhyaḥ saṁharate framing is unique to 2.58; could not come from 2.55 (contentment-source) or 2.57 (response-neutrality). The analog specifically anchors on BG 2.58's unique vocabulary, not on a generic operator-doctrine that could equally come from any chapter-2 verse.
